# POS Sales Reports by Category only

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module removes product lines on Reports as below:
: ```{image} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/pos/16.0/pos_daily_sales_reports_category_only/static/img/sample_report.png
  ```

This feature is enabled by default on installation of the module. It can be disabled by unchecking this setting:
: ```{image} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/pos/16.0/pos_daily_sales_reports_category_only/static/img/pos_config.png
  ```
